/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++11 -Wall -Wextra -Wfatal-errors -fopenmp -ggdb3 -O2 -march=native -mtune=native -O3 -DNDEBUG -rdynamic CMakeFiles/common_routing_algorithms_test.dir/common/routing_algorithms/tests/test_routing_algorithms.cpp.o -o common_routing_algorithms_test  libsnark.a ../depends/libff/libff/libff.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgmp.so -lgmp -lgmpxx -lcrypto ../depends/libzm.a
